name: Web Studio
description: Build a website with the agent and preview it live in an in-app browser.
author: mobius-os

storage_seeds.files/index.html:
Web Studio

Hello from Web Studio

This is your starting point. Edit the files on the left, or ask the agent below to build the site you have in mind, then tap Build to preview it live.

See what you can do

Describe it

Tell the agent what you want — a landing page, a portfolio, a menu — in plain words.

Edit it

Tweak the HTML, CSS, and JS directly in the editor. Changes save as you type.

Preview it

Hit Build to assemble your files and see the result in the in-app browser.

Made with Web Studio on Möbius
